result.synthesis_reasoning: All three sources show a lack of strong, convergent evidence for a single concrete upstream root cause. The Log Agent finds no error logs within the window, which lowers confidence in any downstream/upstream fault trace. The Topology Agent confirms multiple plausible upstreams for the frontend but cannot single out one due to lack of concrete log-triggered propagation path. The TCB-RCA result centers on the symptom service (frontend) with no detected anomalies elsewhere, yielding a conservative root-cause stance. Given the absence of corroborating log-based propagation and only structural plausibility, we treat frontend as the strongest single candidate (as a cautious root-cause candidate) and currencyservice as a potential unobserved upstream candidate, acknowledging weak convergence across sources.
